name: IRC_TP_CATEGORIES_VL
query: SELECT IRC_TP_CATEGORIES_B.CATEGORY_ID CATEGORY_ID, IRC_TP_CATEGORIES_B.CODE CODE, IRC_TP_CATEGORIES_TL.CATEGORY_NAME CATEGORY_NAME, IRC_TP_CATEGORIES_TL.SUB_CATEGORY_NAME SUB_CATEGORY_NAME, IRC_TP_CATEGORIES_TL.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, IRC_TP_CATEGORIES_B.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, IRC_TP_CATEGORIES_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, IRC_TP_CATEGORIES_B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, IRC_TP_CATEGORIES_B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, IRC_TP_CATEGORIES_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, IRC_TP_CATEGORIES_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, IRC_TP_CATEGORIES_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_TP_CATEGORIES_B, IRC_TP_CATEGORIES_TL WHERE IRC_TP_CATEGORIES_B.CATEGORY_ID = IRC_TP_CATEGORIES_TL.CATEGORY_ID AND IRC_TP_CATEGORIES_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
